name: VTIL_SetVTStatus
title: VTIL_SetVTStatus
description: Forms (1) and (3): This function changes the cycle time of the VT Status message.The content of VT Status message stays unchanged.
Forms (2) and (4): This function changes the content and cycle time of the VT Status message.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function
